acf.short_information: Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB), has released a notification on official website for the recruitment of Radiographer, Assistant Manager, Patwari & Other Various Post. This recruitment is for 216 positions. DSSSB Application Form has started on 27 February 2026 & the candidates can apply till the 28 March 2026. Minimum age required is 18 - 21 Years & The Maximum Age Is 27 - 32 Years (Post Wise) as on 28 March 2026. Candidates must check the complete details for DSSSB Various Post Recruitment 2026. which has given below. (Advt No. : 02/2026)

Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL), The Official Notification For The Recruitment Of Senior Executive Trainee SET Has Released. This Recruitment Is For 120 Positions. The Candidates Can Apply Until 31 March 2026 (Extended). Candidates Must Check The Complete Details For The BSNL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026. (Advt. No. BSNLCO-11/12(11)/1/2025-RECTT-CO-Part(1))

acf.eligibility: Candidates must have a B.E. / B.Tech degree in Electronics & Telecommunication, Electronics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical, or Instrumentation Engineering with minimum 60% marks.
acf.how_to_steps:
Interested candidates who wish to apply for the BSNL post can submit their application online before 31 March 2026.
Use the click here link provided below under important link section to apply directly.
Alternatively, visit the official website of BSNL to complete the application process online.
Make sure to complete the application before the deadline 31 March 2026.
Note – छात्रो से ये अनुरोध किया जाता है की वो अपना फॉर्म भरने से पहले Official Notification को ध्यान से जरूर पढे उसके बाद ही अपना फॉर्म भरे । (Last Date, Age Limit, & Education Qualification)
acf.faq:
Question: When will the online application for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 Start?
Answer: The online application for this recruitment has started on 05 February 2026.

Question: What is the last date for online application for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Online Form 2026?
Answer: The last date for online application Form is 31 March 2026.

Question: What is the age limit for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026?
Answer: The age limit for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026 is as follows:
The Minimum age is 21 Years & The Maximum Age Is 30 Years as on 07 March 2026.

Question: What is the eligibility for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Vacancy 2026?
Answer: The eligibility for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026 is as follows post wise.

Question: What is the official website for BSNL?
Answer: The official website for BSNL is https://bsnl.co.in/en

acf.short_information: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB), Has Released The Official Notification On The Official Website For The Recruitment Of Group-D (Level-1) Posts Across Various Railway Zones In India. RRB Application Form Last Date 02 March 2026. Candidates Can Apply Before Last Date. The Minimum Age Required Is 18 Years & The Maximum Age Is 33 Years As On 01 January 2026 Candidates Can Also Check All Details Of RRB Group-D Recruitment 2026. (Advt. No. CEN 09/2025)

title.rendered: Railway RRB Group D Answer Key 2026

acf.short_information: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB), will be release the Answer Key on its official website for the Recruitment of RRB Group-D Exam 2026. The exam will be conducted 27 November 2025 - 10 February 2026, and the last date to submit the application form was 01 March 2025. Candidates Can Check their Answer Key using their Enrollment Number, Registration Number, or Date of Birth by logging into the portal. The direct link is provided below.

acf.marking_scheme:
Correct Answer : +1 mark.
Wrong Answer : -1/3 mark deduction.

Computer Based Test (CBT-1)
Physical Efficiency Test
Document Verification
Medical Examination
acf.how_to_steps:
Go to the official website of the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) for the region where you applied.
On the homepage, find the Latest Updates / Candidate Information / Notifications section.
Look for the notification titled “RRB Group D Answer Key 2026.”
Click on the Answer Key link once it becomes active.
You may be asked to log in using your Registration Number / Roll Number and Date of Birth (or password).
After logging in, your provisional answer key and your recorded responses will be displayed.
Download the answer key PDF and save it to your device.
You can use the answer key to calculate your probable score before the results are announced.
acf.faq:
Question: When will the Railway RRB Group D Answer Key 2026 be conducted?
Answer: The exact answer key has announced in the official notification 2026.
Question: Who conducts the RRB Group D Exam?
Answer: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) conducts the exam across different regions in India.
Question: What posts are covered under RRB Group D recruitment?
Answer: Group D includes posts like Track Maintainer, Helper, Assistant Pointsman, and Level-1 staff in railways.
Question: How can I check the exam date for RRB Group D 2025?
Answer: Candidates can check the exam schedule on the official RRB regional websites and through the admit card.
Question: What is the official website for RRB?
Answer: The official website for RRB is https://indianrailways.gov.in/
